STATE  OF  CALIFORNIA  - HEALTH  AND  HUMAN  SERVICES  AGENCY
DEPARTMENT OF  DEVELOPMENTAL SERVICES
AGNEWS DEVELOPMENTAL CENTER3500 ZANKER ROAD
SAN  JOSE, CA  95134-2299
(4 0 8 ) 451-6000
ARNOLD  S C H W A R Z E N E G G E R , Governor
June 16, 2004
Feng Kuang Líu
26471 Weston Drive
Los  Altos  Hills, California 94022
Dear Mr. Liu,
We  w o u l d like  t o e x t e n d o u r deepest  sympathies t o y o u i n the  loss  o f y o u r w i f e , M e i c h u ("Grace*)G . L i u . Grace  h a d m a n y friends  at  Agnews  a n d will  be  r e m e m b e r e d b y a l l whose  life  she  touchedo n a daily basis.
I n r e v i e w i n g M r s . Liu's  personnel  records  o n ﬁ l e , she  has  listed y o u as  h e r "Designee"  t o receive  allstate warrants that w o u l d have  b e e n payable  t o h e r h a d she  survived. Please  n o t e , this designationis  not  f o r the  payment  o f d e a t h beneﬁts  o r the  r e f u n d o f employee  retirement  contributions. Theseagencies will  contact y o u directly f o r any required information and/or documents.
Please  ﬁ n d e n c l o s e d the  form  "REQUEST  F O R DELIVERY  OF  WARRANTS  OF  A DECEASEDE M P L O Y E E " . Y o u will  n e e d t o c o m p l e t e , sign a n d have  the  form  notarized b y a public  notaryu p o n receipt, we  c a n t h e n release  any m o n i e s t o y o u that w o u l d have  b e e n payable t o M r s . Liu.
I n c l o s i n g , s h o u l d y o u have  a n y q u e s t i o n s , please  d o not  hesitate  t o contact  me  at  ( 4 0 8 ) 451-6156o r Linda  P a c h e c o o f m y staff at  ( 4 0 8 ) 451-6144.
Sincerely,
L i m b u l y fonderI m b e r l y Ponde
Personnel Ofﬁcer
Personnel Services Department
KP:LCP:Lop
Eec
co:  Ofﬁcial Personnel File
